title: Jiu Jitsu Kids - BJJ Lab Zürich
text: HOW TO START? Home > Programs > Jiu Jitsu Kids JIU JITSU KIDS Brazilian Jiu Jitsu for Kids in Zürich Oerlikon. All our kids classes are taught in German. OUR ONE WEEK FREE TRIAL In a relaxed, playful and fun environment the kids learn jiu jitsu techniques, improve their movement skills and socialize with other kids. To help you determine if BJJ Lab Zürich is the right fit for your kid, we offer a free one-week trial. During this period, they can fully immerse themselves in our classes. We offer free loaner uniforms during the trial week, ensuring your child has everything they need to get started. We also have a complete kids BJJ guide for parents available. SCHEDULE YOUR FIRST CLASS OUR METHOD At BJJ Lab Zürich, we strive to create a fun and dynamic training environment where kids can stay focused, learn jiu jitsu, improve their movement skills, and burn off excess energy—all while having fun. 4 kids classes per week Fun skill-based games Get rid of excess energy Improved movement skills Bully-proofing Socializing with other kids Structured curriculum Regular stripe and belt promotions Qualified coaches MondayTuesdayWednesdayThursdayFridayMat 1Mat 2Mat 1Mat 2Mat 1Mat 2Mat 1Mat 2Mat 1Mat 2FundamentalsNogi07:00 -
